description_long: This is a modern, single-speed bicycle with a minimalist design, featuring a matte black frame and striking turquoise rims and handlebar grips. The frame is constructed in a classic diamond geometry, with straight top and down tubes and a standard horizontal seat stay. The wheels are thin and fitted with black tires, and the pedals are flat and wide for urban riding. The handlebars are flat, providing an upright riding position, and the seat is a standard black saddle designed for comfort and efficiency. There are no visible racks, baskets, or additional accessories, emphasizing a streamlined, urban commuter style.
description: A sleek black bicycle with turquoise rims and grips, featuring a diamond frame and flat handlebars. It has a minimalist, urban design with no racks or baskets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full diamond frame, turquoise rims, flat handlebars, and standard saddle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the handlebars, turquoise grips, and the narrow profile of the tires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same frame and wheel features, with clear visibility of the drivetrain and pedals.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the seat, rear wheel alignment, and the symmetry of the frame and handlebars.
